First Five Year Plan.description: Gain $10M. Build 1 factory. Launch a crash program of forced industrialization to modernize the economy.

Heavy Industry.description: Build 2 factories. Prioritize heavy industry: steel, coal, and machinery above all else.

Steel Production.description: +10% money production. Build 1 factory. Massively expand steel output to feed the industrial machine.

Magnitogorsk.description: Build 2 factories. +5% money production. Build a colossal steel combine in the Urals as the backbone of Soviet industry.

Second Five Year Plan.description: Gain $10M. +5 base stability. Continue industrialization while turning attention to consumer welfare.

Consumer Goods.description: +10 base stability. Produce consumer goods to improve the daily lives of Soviet citizens.

Agricultural Reform.description: Gain $5M. +5 base stability. Reorganize agriculture to increase food production and feed the cities.

Collectivization.description: Gain $10M. -10 base stability. Force peasants onto collective farms to extract surplus for industrialization.

Third Five Year Plan.description: Gain $15M. Focus the third plan squarely on military-industrial preparation.

War Industry.description: Build 2 factories. +10% build speed. Redirect industrial capacity toward producing weapons and ammunition.

Tank Production.description: +10% attack. Build 1 factory. Mass-produce tanks on an unprecedented scale in Ural factories.

Aviation Industry.description: +10% attack. Build 1 factory. Build a massive aviation industry to produce thousands of military aircraft.

Siberian Development.description: Gain $5M. Open up the vast wilderness of Siberia for settlement and exploitation.

Trans-Siberian Expansion.description: +10% transport speed. Build 1 factory. Expand and modernize the Trans-Siberian Railway for strategic logistics.

Resource Extraction.description: Gain $15M. +5% money production. Exploit Siberia's enormous reserves of oil, gas, minerals, and timber.

Arctic Route.description: Gain $10M. +10% transport speed. Open the Northern Sea Route for year-round Arctic navigation.

Political Consolidation.description: +50 political power. Tighten the grip of the ruling party over every aspect of Soviet life.

Party Congress.description: +10% political power gain. +25 political power. Convene a Party Congress to set the ideological direction of the state.

Soviet Constitution.description: +10 base stability. +25 political power. Adopt a new constitution enshrining the Soviet system of government.

The Great Purge.description: -10 base stability. +75 political power. Shift 20% authoritarian. Unleash a campaign of terror to eliminate all perceived enemies of the state.

Military Purge.description: -15% attack. -10% defense. Purge the officer corps, crippling military leadership but ensuring loyalty.

Political Purge.description: -5 base stability. +15% political power gain. Eliminate political rivals and consolidate absolute power.

Secret Police.description: +15 base stability. +100 political power. Empower the secret police to maintain order through surveillance and fear.

Reform and Opening.description: +10 base stability. Shift 15% libertarian. Choose the path of reform and cautious political liberalization.

Rehabilitations.description: +10 base stability. +10% attack. Rehabilitate purged officers and political figures to restore institutional strength.

Political Reforms.description: +15% political power gain. +10 base stability. Introduce limited political reforms to allow greater participation.

Glasnost.description: +15 base stability. Shift 20% left. Shift 20% libertarian. Embrace openness and transparency in government and society.

Socialist Realism.description: +5 base stability. Mandate Socialist Realism as the only acceptable artistic doctrine.

State Media.description: +5 base stability. +25 political power. Place all media under direct state control.

Propaganda.description: +10 base stability. +5% political power gain. Flood the nation with propaganda glorifying the state and its leaders.

Cultural Revolution.description: +5 base stability. Shift 15% left. Transform society by rooting out bourgeois culture and replacing it with socialist values.

Worker Soviets.description: Gain $5M. +5 base stability. Empower local worker councils as the basic unit of Soviet governance.

Trade Unions.description: +5% money production. +5 base stability. Organize state-controlled trade unions to mobilize the workforce.

Stakhanovite Movement.description: +10% money production. +5% build speed. Celebrate heroic workers who exceed production quotas to inspire mass productivity.

Red Army Reforms.description: Gain $10M. Train 1 division. Begin comprehensive reform and modernization of the Red Army.

Deep Battle Doctrine.description: +10% attack. +5% transport speed. Develop the theory of deep operations to shatter the enemy across their entire depth.

Shock Armies.description: +15% attack. Train 2 divisions. Form elite shock armies designed to punch through enemy defenses.

Tank Corps.description: +15% attack. +10% transport speed. Organize independent tank corps for deep exploitation operations.

Fortification Program.description: +10% defense. Construct a network of fortified zones along the western frontier.

Stalin Line.description: +15% defense. Build the massive Stalin Line of fortifications from the Baltic to the Black Sea.

Defense in Depth.description: +20% defense. +10 base stability. Adopt a strategy of trading space for time across multiple defensive lines.

Red Navy.description: Gain $5M. +5% defense. Rebuild the Soviet Navy to project power across multiple seas.

Black Sea Fleet.description: +5% defense. +5% attack. Strengthen the Black Sea Fleet to dominate the southern maritime approaches.

Pacific Fleet.description: +10% defense. Gain $5M. Expand the Pacific Fleet to counter Japanese naval power in the Far East.

Submarine Program.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Build the world's largest submarine fleet for coastal defense and commerce raiding.

Red Air Force.description: +5% attack. Gain $5M. Establish a modern air force as an integral arm of the Soviet military.

Fighter Aviation.description: +10% defense. Build 1 factory. Produce modern fighters to protect Soviet skies from enemy bombers.

Ground Attack.description: +10% attack. Develop dedicated ground-attack aircraft like the Sturmovik to support the Red Army.

Strategic Bombers.description: +15% attack. Build a strategic bomber force to strike deep behind enemy lines.

Militia Training.description: Train 1 division. +5% defense. Train civilian militia to supplement the regular armed forces.

Partisan Networks.description: +10% defense. Train 1 division. Establish clandestine partisan networks to resist enemy occupation.

People's War.description: +15% defense. +10 base stability. Mobilize the entire population for a war of national survival.

Comintern.description: +50 political power. Unlocks faction creation. Lead the Communist International to spread revolution worldwide.

International Solidarity.description: +5 base stability. +25 political power. Rally international communist parties to the Soviet cause.

World Revolution.description: +10% attack. Unlocks expanded faction invitations. Commit to exporting revolution to the far corners of the globe.

Molotov-Ribbentrop.description: +10 base stability. Gain $10M. Sign a non-aggression pact with Germany to buy time for military preparation.

Spheres of Influence.description: +50 political power. +5% attack. Enforce the secret protocols dividing Eastern Europe into spheres of influence.

Buffer States.description: +10% defense. +5 base stability. Establish a ring of buffer states to shield the Soviet heartland.

Anti-Fascist Front.description: +10 base stability. +25 political power. Build a broad anti-fascist coalition to oppose the Axis powers.

Popular Fronts.description: +10 base stability. +5% attack. Support popular front governments across Europe against the fascist threat.

Allied Cooperation.description: Gain $15M. +10% attack. +5% defense. Forge a wartime alliance with the Western democracies against the common enemy.

Claims on Finland.description: +25 political power. Press territorial demands against Finland for strategic border adjustments.

Winter War Preparations.description: Train 2 divisions. +5% attack. Prepare the Red Army for a winter campaign against Finnish defenses.

Karelian Integration.description: Build 1 factory. +5% defense. +5 base stability. Integrate the conquered Karelian territories into the Soviet state.

Baltic Claims.description: +25 political power. +5% attack. Assert Soviet influence over the Baltic states.

Estonian Ultimatum.description: Build 1 factory. Gain $3M. Issue an ultimatum to Estonia demanding military basing rights.

Latvian Ultimatum.description: Build 1 factory. Gain $3M. Issue an ultimatum to Latvia demanding the installation of Soviet garrisons.

Lithuanian Ultimatum.description: Build 1 factory. Gain $3M. +5 base stability. Issue a final ultimatum to Lithuania and absorb all three Baltic states.

Polish Question.description: +25 political power. Raise the question of Poland's eastern territories claimed by the Soviet Union.

Eastern Poland.description: Build 2 factories. Gain $5M. Occupy and annex the eastern regions of Poland populated by Ukrainians and Belarusians.

Galician Integration.description: Build 1 factory. +5 base stability. Gain $5M. Integrate the Galician territories into the Ukrainian SSR.

Bessarabia.description: Build 1 factory. Gain $3M. Demand Romania cede the contested region of Bessarabia to the Soviet Union.

Moldavian SSR.description: Build 1 factory. +5 base stability. Gain $3M. Establish the Moldavian Soviet Socialist Republic on annexed Romanian territory.
